schema.title: xLights Effect Panel Metadata
schema.description: Cross-platform description of an effect's configurable properties and UI layout

effectName.description: Effect name as registered in EffectManager (e.g. 'Fire')

canvasMode.description: When true, automatically enable Canvas mode in Layer Blending when this effect is selected

groups.description: Tab groups or section groups for organizing properties

id.description: Property identifier (e.g. 'Fire_Height'). Setting key is derived from id + controlType.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover for the primary control

divisor.description: Float divisor. Slider stores value*divisor as int, text shows float. 1=int, 10=F1, 100=F2, 360=F360

valueCurve.description: Whether this property supports value curves for animation

vcMin.description: Value curve minimum (overrides 'min' when VC range differs from slider range)

vcMax.description: Value curve maximum (overrides 'max' when VC range differs from slider range)

lockable.description: Whether this property can be locked to prevent random effect changes

separator.description: Show a horizontal separator line above this property

suppressIfDefault.description: Omit this property from the effect string when it has its default value

fileFilter.description: File filter/wildcard for file picker controls

fileMessage.description: Dialog title for file picker controls

type.description: tabs = wxNotebook, section = wxStaticBoxSizer, xyCenter = XY position control pair

xProperty.description: Property id for horizontal (X) slider (xyCenter type)

yProperty.description: Property id for vertical (Y) slider (xyCenter type)

wrapX.description: Property id for Wrap X checkbox (xyCenter type, optional)

wrapY.description: Property id for Wrap Y checkbox (xyCenter type, optional)

properties.description: Property ids in this tab
Property ids in this section (for 'section' type)

oneOf.description: List of values, any of which matches

any.description: List of property ids; rule triggers if ANY are true/checked

enable.description: Property ids to enable when condition is met

disable.description: Property ids to disable when condition is met

show.description: Property ids to show when condition is met

hide.description: Property ids to hide when condition is met

properties.label: Adjustment
properties.description: The type of channel value adjustment to apply. Options include adding/scaling values, clamping to min/max/range, shifting with wrap, excluding a range, or reversing brightness.

properties.label: Value 1
properties.description: Primary adjustment value. Its meaning depends on the action: offset amount for Adjust By Value, percentage for Adjust By Percentage, minimum for Set Minimum, or lower bound for Set Range.

properties.label: Value 2
properties.description: Secondary adjustment value used by actions that require a range, such as Set Range and Prevent Range, where it defines the upper bound.

properties.label: Nth Channel
properties.description: Apply the adjustment to every Nth channel. A value of 1 adjusts every channel, 2 adjusts every other channel, 3 every third, etc.

properties.label: Starting At
properties.description: The first channel number (1-based) to begin applying the adjustment. Channels before this position are left unchanged.

properties.label: Count
properties.description: Maximum number of channels to adjust. A value of 0 means adjust all matching channels with no limit.

properties.label: Palette Rep
properties.description: Number of times the full palette color sequence repeats across the model. Higher values produce more, thinner bars.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of times the bars scroll completely across the model during the effect. Higher values make the bars move faster.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Direction the bars travel. Expand/compress radiate from or collapse toward a center point. Alternate modes snap bars one step at a time. Custom modes place static bars with an adjustable center offset.

properties.label: Center Point
properties.description: Shifts the expansion/compression origin or the static bar offset. 0 is the model center; negative values shift left/down, positive values shift right/up.

properties.label: Highlight
properties.description: Adds a bright white highlight line at the leading edge of each bar to make the boundaries between colors more visible.

properties.label: Use First Color for Highlight
properties.description: When Highlight is enabled, uses the first palette color for the highlight line instead of white. The first color is then excluded from the bar pattern.

properties.label: 3D
properties.description: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient within each bar so it fades from full brightness at one edge to dark at the other, giving a three-dimensional appearance.

properties.label: Gradient
properties.description: Smoothly blends colors between adjacent bars instead of using hard edges, creating a continuous gradient across the palette.

properties.label: Colors
properties.description: Selects the color source. Rainbow uses a full HSV rainbow cycle, while Palette uses the user-defined palette colors.

properties.label: Style
properties.description: Selects the mathematical pattern formula. Styles 1-5 produce geometric butterfly-like patterns; styles 6-10 generate animated plasma effects.

properties.label: Bkgrd Chunks
properties.description: Divides the pattern into repeated segments, increasing the frequency of the mathematical function to create more detailed or tiled patterns.

properties.label: Bkgrd Skip
properties.description: Controls the spacing interval used when sampling the pattern. Higher values skip more of the pattern, creating a coarser or more spread-out appearance.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast the pattern animates. For styles 1-5 this sets the scroll rate; for plasma styles 6-10 higher values produce slower, smoother animation.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Sets the animation direction. Reverse inverts the pattern movement so it scrolls in the opposite direction.

properties.label: Flame Agility
properties.description: Controls how quickly the flame responds to changes. Higher values make the flame snap to new brightness levels faster, creating a more erratic flicker.

properties.label: Wind Baseline
properties.description: Sets the resting wind strength that the simulated wind constantly settles toward. Higher values increase the chance of the wind knocking down the flame.

properties.label: Wind Variability
properties.description: Controls how often random wind gusts occur. Higher values produce more frequent gusts that disturb the flame.

properties.label: Wind Calmness
properties.description: Dampens the wind's effect on the flame. Higher values make the flame more resistant to being blown down, producing a calmer, steadier flicker.

properties.label: Per node
properties.description: When enabled, each pixel gets its own independent flame simulation instead of all pixels showing the same flame color.

properties.label: Use Palette
properties.description: When enabled, the flame color blends between the first two palette colors based on brightness. When disabled, the flame uses a natural orange/yellow candle color.

properties.label: Number of Circles
properties.description: Sets the number of circles drawn on the model. In radial mode, controls the number of color rings.

properties.label: Size
properties.description: Controls the radius of each circle. In radial mode, this sets the thickness of the concentric rings.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast the circles move across the model. In radial mode, controls the speed of the outward ring expansion.

properties.label: Bounce
properties.description: When enabled, circles bounce off the edges of the model instead of wrapping around to the opposite side.

properties.label: Radial
properties.description: Draws expanding concentric rings radiating outward from the center point, using palette colors in alternating bands.

properties.label: Plasma
properties.description: Uses a metaball algorithm where overlapping circle influence fields blend together, creating smooth organic plasma-like shapes.

properties.label: Radial 3D
properties.description: Draws expanding concentric rings with a continuously cycling rainbow hue based on distance from center, creating a 3D-like depth effect.

properties.label: Bubbles
properties.description: Draws hollow circle outlines instead of filled circles, and launches them upward at slightly random angles to simulate rising bubbles.

properties.label: Linear Fade
properties.description: Makes each circle fade from full brightness at the center to dark at the edge, creating a soft glow effect instead of a solid fill.

properties.label: X Center
properties.description: Shifts the center point of radial rings horizontally. Only active when Radial or Radial 3D is enabled.

properties.label: Y Center
properties.description: Shifts the center point of radial rings vertically. Only active when Radial or Radial 3D is enabled.

properties.label: Count
properties.description: Number of times the full palette color sequence cycles during the effect. Higher values make the color transitions happen faster.

properties.label: Vertical Fade
properties.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the vertical center to black at the top and bottom edges.

properties.label: Horizontal Fade
properties.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the horizontal center to black at the left and right edges.

properties.label: Reverse Fades
properties.description: Reverses the direction of the vertical and horizontal fades so brightness is at the edges and fades to black at the center.

properties.label: Shimmer
properties.description: Alternates between the current wash color and black on every other frame, creating a rapid strobe-like flicker.

properties.label: Circular Palette
properties.description: Makes the palette wrap around by blending the last color back into the first, creating a seamless continuous color loop instead of stopping at the last color.

properties.label: Curtain Edge
properties.description: Sets which edge or pair of edges the curtain opens/closes from. Center and middle split the curtain into two halves that move symmetrically.

properties.label: Effect
properties.description: Controls the curtain motion. Open reveals the model by pulling the curtain away; close covers it. Combined modes perform both actions in sequence within the effect duration.

properties.label: Swag Width
properties.description: Controls the width of the decorative draped curve at the curtain edge. Higher values create a wider parabolic swag that hangs down from the top.

properties.label: Swag Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast the curtain opens or closes. Values above 1 make the curtain complete its motion before the effect ends; values below 1 slow it down.

properties.label: Repeat
properties.description: When enabled, the curtain motion cycles repeatedly for the duration of the effect instead of playing once and stopping.

Notebook with three tabs (Channels 1-16, 17-32, 33-48). Each tab contains 16 rows of: channel label + slider + value curve + text buddy + invert checkbox. Channel values are serialized as E_SLIDER_DMX<N> (0-255), value curves as E_VALUECURVE_DMX<N>, and invert flags as E_CHECKBOX_INVDMX<N>. Channel labels are driven by the target model's node names via SetPanelStatus, and out-of-range channels are disabled based on the model's channel count.

Custom row with three buttons: Remap Channels (opens the remap dialog, with a right-click menu for bulk-editing selected effects), Save As State (saves the current channel values as a SingleNode CustomColors state on the target model), and Load From State (reads channel values from an existing SingleNode state). The Save button is disabled when any channel has an active value curve.

properties.label: Model
properties.description: The source model, submodel, or strand whose effects will be duplicated onto the current model.

properties.label: Layer
properties.description: The layer number on the source model to duplicate effects from. Layer 1 is the first (bottom) layer.

properties.label: Override duplicated Palette
properties.description: When enabled, the color palette from this effect is used instead of the palette from the duplicated source effect.

properties.label: Override duplicated Color settings
properties.description: When enabled, the color settings (sparkles, brightness, etc.) from this effect override those from the duplicated source.

properties.label: Override duplicated Layer Blending settings
properties.description: When enabled, the layer blending and transition settings from this effect override those from the duplicated source.

properties.label: Override duplicated Layer settings
properties.description: When enabled, the buffer/layer settings (rotation, zoom, etc.) from this effect override those from the duplicated source.
Drives the mouth phonemes. Pick a Phoneme for a single fixed mouth shape, or pick a Timing Track with phoneme labels for automatic lip-sync.

properties.label: Face Definition
properties.description: Selects which face definition from the model to use. Face definitions map phonemes to specific nodes or image files on the model.

properties.label: State
properties.description: Controls the eye state. Open keeps eyes always open, Closed keeps them shut, Auto adds periodic random blinking, and (off) disables eye rendering.

properties.label: Blink Frequency
properties.description: How often automatic eye blinks occur when Eyes is set to Auto. Faster settings produce more frequent blinking.

properties.label: Blink Duration
properties.description: How long each automatic eye blink lasts when Eyes is set to Auto. Longer durations keep the eyes closed for more frames per blink.

properties.label: Show outline
properties.description: When enabled, displays the face outline nodes in addition to the mouth and eyes, using the defined outline node group.

properties.label: Suppress shimmer
properties.description: When enabled, prevents the shimmer animation on phoneme shapes that are defined with a shimmer suffix in the face definition.

properties.label: Use State as outline
properties.description: Selects a state definition to use as the face outline instead of the default outline. Allows combining state effects with face rendering.

properties.label: Suppress when not singing
properties.description: When enabled, the entire face (including outline) is hidden during rest phonemes or when no phoneme is active. Requires a Timing Track.

properties.label: Lead In/Out Frames
properties.description: Number of frames to fade in before the first phoneme and fade out after the last phoneme on the timing track. Creates smoother transitions at the start and end of singing.

properties.label: Fade during lead in/out
properties.description: When enabled, the face brightness gradually fades during the lead in and lead out frames instead of appearing/disappearing abruptly.
Transparent Black enable checkbox with an inline brightness threshold slider (0-300). When enabled, face image pixels below the threshold are keyed out as transparent.

properties.label: Center X
properties.description: Horizontal position of the fan center as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Center Y
properties.description: Vertical position of the fan center as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Radius1
properties.description: Inner radius of the fan blades. Pixels closer to the center than this are not drawn.

properties.label: Angle
properties.description: Starting rotation angle of the fan blades in degrees.

properties.label: Radius2
properties.description: Outer radius of the fan blades. Pixels farther from the center than this are not drawn.

properties.label: Rev's
properties.description: Total number of revolutions the fan rotates over the duration of the effect. settingPrefix:SLIDER because FanEffect::Render calls GetValueCurveInt which reads SLIDER_<id> as a raw pre-divisor int and divides inside ValueCurve.

properties.label: # Blades
properties.description: Number of blades evenly spaced around the fan.

properties.label: Width
properties.description: Angular width of each blade as a percentage of the space between blades. Higher values make wider blades with less gap.

properties.label: Angle
properties.description: Twist angle applied to each blade based on distance from center, creating curved or spiral blade shapes.

properties.label: # Elements
properties.description: Number of colored sub-elements within each blade. Each element uses the next palette color.

properties.label: Width
properties.description: Width of each element as a percentage of the available element space. Lower values create gaps between elements.

properties.label: Duration
properties.description: Percentage of the effect time that the blades are fully visible. Lower values cause the blades to grow in and shrink out.

properties.label: Acceleration
properties.description: Adjusts the rotation speed curve. Positive values accelerate toward the end, negative values decelerate.

properties.label: Reverse
properties.description: Reverses the direction of fan rotation.

properties.label: Blend Edges
properties.description: When enabled, blade edges fade smoothly using alpha or brightness instead of having hard edges.

properties.label: Scale to Buffer
properties.description: When enabled, radius values are treated as percentages of the buffer size rather than absolute pixel values.

properties.label: Position
properties.description: How far the fill extends across the buffer as a percentage. Typically animated with a value curve to create a filling or emptying motion.

properties.label: Band Size
properties.description: Width of each colored band in pixels. When zero, colors blend smoothly across the fill area.

properties.label: Skip Size
properties.description: Number of blank (black) pixels between each colored band. Only applies when Band Size is greater than zero.

properties.label: Offset
properties.description: Shifts the starting position of the fill. Interpretation depends on the Offset in Pixels setting.

properties.label: Offset in Pixels
properties.description: When enabled, the offset value is in pixels. When disabled, it is a percentage of the buffer dimension.

properties.label: Change Color based on Time
properties.description: When enabled, color is determined by the effect time position. When disabled, color is based on spatial position within the fill.

properties.label: Wrap
properties.description: When enabled, the fill wraps around to the beginning of the buffer after reaching the end.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Direction the fill progresses across the buffer.

properties.label: Height
properties.description: Controls how tall the flames reach. Higher values produce taller flames that extend further across the buffer.

properties.label: Hue Shift
properties.description: Shifts the fire color palette hue. At zero the fire is red/yellow; increasing values shift toward other colors like blue or green.

properties.label: Growth Cycles
properties.description: Number of times the fire height oscillates (grows and shrinks) over the effect duration. Zero means no oscillation.

properties.label: Grow with music
properties.description: When enabled, flame height is driven by audio volume instead of the Height and Growth Cycles settings.

properties.label: Location
properties.description: Which edge of the buffer the fire originates from.

properties.label: Number of Explosions
properties.description: Total number of firework explosions randomly distributed across the effect duration. Disabled when using music or timing triggers.

properties.label: Particles in Explosion
properties.description: Number of particles created in each explosion. More particles create denser, more dramatic bursts.

properties.label: Velocity of Particles
properties.description: Maximum speed of particles as they fly outward from the explosion center. Higher values create larger bursts.

properties.label: X Velocity
properties.description: Horizontal drift applied to all particles. Positive values push particles to the right, negative to the left.

properties.label: Y Velocity
properties.description: Vertical drift applied to all particles. Positive values push particles upward, negative downward.

properties.label: X Location
properties.description: Fixed horizontal position for explosions as a percentage of buffer width. Set to -1 for random placement.

properties.label: Y Location
properties.description: Fixed vertical position for explosions as a percentage of buffer height. Set to -1 for random placement.

properties.label: Hold color
properties.description: When enabled, each particle keeps its initial color as it fades. When disabled, particles cycle through the palette as they age.

properties.label: Gravity
properties.description: When enabled, particles arc downward over time simulating gravity. When disabled, particles fly in straight lines.

properties.label: Particle Fade
properties.description: How long particles remain visible before fading out. Higher values make particles last longer.

properties.label: Fire with music
properties.description: When enabled, explosions are triggered by audio volume peaks instead of being evenly distributed.

properties.label: Trigger level
properties.description: Audio volume threshold for triggering explosions when Fire with music is enabled. Lower values trigger more easily.

properties.label: Fire with timing track
properties.description: When enabled, explosions are triggered at the start and end marks of a selected timing track.

properties.label: Timing Track
properties.description: The timing track whose marks trigger firework explosions when Fire with timing track is enabled.

properties.label: Center X
properties.description: Horizontal position of the galaxy center as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Center Y
properties.description: Vertical position of the galaxy center as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Radius
properties.description: Inner radius of the spiral arm at the center of the galaxy.

properties.label: Width
properties.description: Thickness of the spiral arm at the inner starting point.

properties.label: Angle
properties.description: Initial rotation angle of the spiral arm in degrees.

properties.label: Radius
properties.description: Outer radius of the spiral arm at the edge of the galaxy.

properties.label: Width
properties.description: Thickness of the spiral arm at the outer ending point.

properties.label: Rev's
properties.description: Number of full revolutions the spiral arm wraps around the center. More revolutions create a tighter spiral. settingPrefix:SLIDER because GalaxyEffect::Render calls GetValueCurveInt which reads SLIDER_<id> as a raw pre-divisor int and divides inside ValueCurve.

properties.label: Head Duration
properties.description: Percentage of the effect time that the leading head of the spiral is visible. Controls how quickly the spiral appears and disappears.

properties.label: Acceleration
properties.description: Adjusts the animation speed curve. Positive values accelerate toward the end, negative values decelerate.

properties.label: Reverse
properties.description: Reverses the direction the spiral arm rotates.

properties.label: Blend Edges
properties.description: When enabled, the spiral arm edges fade smoothly using alpha blending instead of having hard edges.

properties.label: Inward
properties.description: When enabled, the spiral draws from the outside inward. When disabled, it draws from the center outward.

properties.label: Scale To Buffer
properties.description: When enabled, radius and width values are treated as percentages of the buffer size rather than absolute pixel values.

properties.label: Garland Type
properties.description: Selects the garland droop pattern. Type 0 is flat, types 1-4 create increasingly deep U-shaped sags between attachment points.

properties.label: Spacing
properties.description: Distance between garland rows as a percentage of the buffer size. Higher values spread the rows further apart.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of times the garland animation cycles over the effect duration. Controls the speed of garland movement.

properties.label: Stack Direction
properties.description: Direction the garlands stack and move. The 'then' options reverse direction at the midpoint of the effect.

properties.label: Glediator File
properties.description: Path to a Glediator (.gled), Jinx (.out), or CSV file containing pre-rendered pixel data to play back on the model.

properties.label: Duration Treatment
properties.description: How to handle timing when the file length differs from the effect duration. Normal stops at the end, Loop restarts from the beginning, Slow/Accelerate stretches or compresses playback to fit.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Selects the instrument type, which determines the number of strings and tuning used to map MIDI notes to fret positions.

properties.label: Track
properties.description: The timing track containing MIDI note data that drives the guitar visualization.

properties.label: String Appearance
properties.description: How active strings are drawn. On fills a solid band for each string; Wave draws a sine wave oscillation simulating a vibrating string.

properties.label: Fret Count
properties.description: Maximum number of frets on the instrument neck. Higher fret notes are drawn shorter across the buffer width.

properties.label: Base Wavelength
properties.description: Base wavelength multiplier for the wave string appearance. Higher values produce longer, smoother waves.

properties.label: Vary Wavelength By String
properties.description: How much the wavelength varies between strings. Higher values make lower-pitched strings wave more slowly than higher strings.

properties.label: Fade
properties.description: When enabled, notes fade out over their duration by reducing alpha transparency.

properties.label: Collapse
properties.description: When enabled, the height of each string's visual shrinks over the note duration, simulating a decaying vibration.

properties.label: Show Strings
properties.description: When enabled, draws a thin line for each string beyond the fret position, showing the unfretted portion of the string.

properties.label: Vary Wavelength By Fret
properties.description: When enabled, the wave wavelength varies based on fret position so that higher frets produce shorter, tighter waves.

properties.label: Kaleidoscope Type
properties.description: Selects the symmetry pattern used for the kaleidoscope reflection. Triangle and Square use edge-based mirroring, while 6/8/12-Fold use triangular tiling for higher-order symmetry, and Radial creates rotational segment repetition.

properties.label: Center X
properties.description: Horizontal position of the kaleidoscope center point as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Center Y
properties.description: Vertical position of the kaleidoscope center point as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Size
properties.description: Controls the size of the base tile that gets reflected to fill the model. Smaller values create more repetitions; larger values create fewer, bigger reflections.

properties.label: Rotation
properties.description: Rotates the entire kaleidoscope pattern around the center point in degrees.

properties.label: Cells to start
properties.description: Percentage of the buffer cells that are initially alive. Higher values create a denser starting population.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Selects the cellular automaton ruleset: 0=B3/S23 (classic Conway), 1=B35/S236, 2=B357/S1358, 3=B378/S235678, 4=B25678/S5678. Each produces different patterns of growth and decay.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast generations advance. Higher values evolve the cell population more rapidly.

properties.label: Number of Segments
properties.description: Number of zigzag segments that make up the lightning bolt. More segments create a longer, more detailed bolt.

properties.label: Width of Bolt
properties.description: Controls the horizontal deviation of each zigzag segment. Higher values make the bolt spread wider side-to-side.

properties.label: Forked Lightning
properties.description: When enabled, the bolt splits into a secondary fork partway through, creating a branching lightning appearance.

properties.label: Top X Location
properties.description: Horizontal offset of the bolt's starting point relative to center. Negative values shift left, positive shift right.

properties.label: Top Y Location
properties.description: Vertical offset of the bolt's starting point. For 'Up' direction this is from the bottom; for 'Down' it offsets from the top.

properties.label: X Movement
properties.description: Causes the entire bolt to drift horizontally over time. Positive values move right, negative values move left.

properties.label: Width
properties.description: Pixel thickness of each bolt segment line. Higher values draw a wider, more visible bolt.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Direction the lightning bolt extends. 'Up' draws from bottom to top, 'Down' draws from top to bottom.

properties.label: Lines
properties.description: Number of independent line objects drawn on the model. Each line uses the next color from the palette.

properties.label: Points
properties.description: Number of control points per line. Lines are drawn between consecutive points, so more points create multi-segment polylines.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: Pixel width of each drawn line. Higher values produce thicker, bolder lines.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the line points move across the model. Points bounce off the edges when they reach the boundary.

properties.label: Trails
properties.description: Number of trailing afterimages left behind each line, creating a motion trail effect. Zero means no trails.

properties.label: Fade Trails
properties.description: When enabled, older trail copies fade out progressively, creating a smooth motion blur. When disabled, all trail copies are drawn at full opacity.

properties.label: Top Barrier
properties.description: Places a solid wall along the top edge of the model that prevents particles from escaping upward.

properties.label: Bottom Barrier
properties.description: Places a solid wall along the bottom edge of the model that prevents particles from falling through.

properties.label: Left Barrier
properties.description: Places a solid wall along the left edge of the model that prevents particles from escaping to the left.

properties.label: Right Barrier
properties.description: Places a solid wall along the right edge of the model that prevents particles from escaping to the right.

properties.label: Hold Particle Color
properties.description: When enabled, particles keep the color they were assigned at creation. When disabled, particle colors are not preserved during rendering.

properties.label: Mix Colors
properties.description: When enabled, particles that touch each other blend their colors together over time using the physics engine's color mixing.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Selects the physics behavior of the particles. Each type has different properties: Water flows freely, Elastic particles bounce, Viscous particles stick together, Powder behaves like sand, etc.

properties.label: Lifetime
properties.description: How long each particle lives before disappearing, in hundredths of seconds. A value of 1000 means particles last about 10 seconds. Zero means particles live for the entire effect duration.

properties.label: Size
properties.description: Radius of each particle in thousandths of a pixel. Larger values create bigger, blobby particles; smaller values create fine granular particles. Values above 1000 can slow rendering.

properties.label: Warm Up Frames
properties.description: Number of simulation frames to run before the first visible frame. This lets particles settle into a natural state before the effect begins.

properties.label: Despeckle Threshold
properties.description: Fills in isolated black pixels surrounded by colored particles. The value is the maximum number of neighboring black pixels allowed before a gap is filled with the average surrounding color.

properties.label: Gravity
properties.description: Strength of the gravitational force applied to particles. Positive values pull in the direction set by Gravity Angle. Negative values push in the opposite direction.

properties.label: Gravity Angle
properties.description: Direction of gravity in degrees. 0 pulls downward, 90 pulls to the left, 180 pulls upward, and 270 pulls to the right.

properties.label: X
properties.description: Horizontal position of particle source 1 as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Y
properties.description: Vertical position of particle source 1 as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees at which particles are emitted from source 1. 0 is right, 90 is up, 180 is left, 270 is down.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Initial speed of particles emitted from source 1. Higher values launch particles faster in the emission direction.

properties.label: Flow
properties.description: Number of new particles created per frame from source 1. Higher values produce a denser stream of particles.

properties.label: Source Size
properties.description: Width of the emission area for source 1, spread perpendicular to the emission direction. Zero emits from a point; higher values create a wider spray.

properties.label: Flow Matches Music
properties.description: When enabled, the particle flow rate from source 1 scales with the current music volume level.

properties.label: Enabled
properties.description: Enables particle source 2. When disabled, no particles are emitted from this source.

properties.label: X
properties.description: Horizontal position of particle source 2 as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Y
properties.description: Vertical position of particle source 2 as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees at which particles are emitted from source 2. 0 is right, 90 is up, 180 is left, 270 is down.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Initial speed of particles emitted from source 2. Higher values launch particles faster in the emission direction.

properties.label: Flow
properties.description: Number of new particles created per frame from source 2. Higher values produce a denser stream of particles.

properties.label: Source Size
properties.description: Width of the emission area for source 2, spread perpendicular to the emission direction. Zero emits from a point; higher values create a wider spray.

properties.label: Flow Matches Music
properties.description: When enabled, the particle flow rate from source 2 scales with the current music volume level.

properties.label: Enabled
properties.description: Enables particle source 3. When disabled, no particles are emitted from this source.

properties.label: X
properties.description: Horizontal position of particle source 3 as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Y
properties.description: Vertical position of particle source 3 as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees at which particles are emitted from source 3. 0 is right, 90 is up, 180 is left, 270 is down.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Initial speed of particles emitted from source 3. Higher values launch particles faster in the emission direction.

properties.label: Flow
properties.description: Number of new particles created per frame from source 3. Higher values produce a denser stream of particles.

properties.label: Source Size
properties.description: Width of the emission area for source 3, spread perpendicular to the emission direction. Zero emits from a point; higher values create a wider spray.

properties.label: Flow Matches Music
properties.description: When enabled, the particle flow rate from source 3 scales with the current music volume level.

properties.label: Enabled
properties.description: Enables particle source 4. When disabled, no particles are emitted from this source.

properties.label: X
properties.description: Horizontal position of particle source 4 as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Y
properties.description: Vertical position of particle source 4 as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees at which particles are emitted from source 4. 0 is right, 90 is up, 180 is left, 270 is down.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Initial speed of particles emitted from source 4. Higher values launch particles faster in the emission direction.

properties.label: Flow
properties.description: Number of new particles created per frame from source 4. Higher values produce a denser stream of particles.

properties.label: Source Size
properties.description: Width of the emission area for source 4, spread perpendicular to the emission direction. Zero emits from a point; higher values create a wider spray.

properties.label: Flow Matches Music
properties.description: When enabled, the particle flow rate from source 4 scales with the current music volume level.

properties.label: Band Size
properties.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each color band of the marquee pattern.

properties.label: Skip Size
properties.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each color band. Zero means bands are placed back-to-back with no gap.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: Number of concentric marquee rings drawn inward from the outer edge. Each ring is offset by one pixel toward the center.

properties.label: Stagger
properties.description: Offsets the starting position of each concentric ring so inner rings appear shifted relative to outer rings, creating a spiral-like look.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the marquee pattern moves around the perimeter. Zero freezes the animation.

properties.label: Start Pos
properties.description: Initial offset position for the marquee pattern along the perimeter, allowing the starting point to be adjusted.

properties.label: Reverse
properties.description: When enabled, the marquee pattern moves in the opposite direction around the perimeter.

properties.label: Scale X
properties.description: Scales the marquee rectangle width as a percentage. Values below 100 shrink the marquee horizontally.

properties.label: Scale Y
properties.description: Scales the marquee rectangle height as a percentage. Values below 100 shrink the marquee vertically.

properties.label: Offsets In Pixels
properties.description: When enabled, the X and Y center offset values are interpreted as absolute pixel counts instead of percentages of the buffer size.

properties.label: X-axis Center
properties.description: Horizontal offset of the marquee center. Shifts the entire marquee rectangle left or right.

properties.label: Wrap X
properties.description: When enabled, pixels that move past the left or right edge wrap around to the opposite side instead of being clipped.

properties.label: Y-axis Center
properties.description: Vertical offset of the marquee center. Shifts the entire marquee rectangle up or down.

properties.label: Wrap Y
properties.description: When enabled, pixels that move past the top or bottom edge wrap around to the opposite side instead of being clipped.

properties.label: Colors
properties.description: Color scheme for the meteors. Rainbow uses random hues, Range picks random colors from the palette range, and Palette cycles through the defined palette colors.

properties.label: Effect
properties.description: Direction of meteor movement. Down/Up/Left/Right move linearly, Implode moves toward center, Explode moves outward from center, and Icicles create random-length dripping streaks.

properties.label: Count
properties.description: Number of new meteors spawned per frame. Higher values create a denser shower of meteors.

properties.label: Trail Length
properties.description: Length of the fading trail behind each meteor. Higher values create longer tails that fade more gradually.

properties.label: Swirl Intensity
properties.description: Adds a random sideways wobble to each meteor as it moves. Higher values create more pronounced swirling motion.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the meteors travel across the model. Higher values make meteors move more pixels per frame.

properties.label: Warm up frames
properties.description: Number of simulation frames to run before the first visible frame, so the effect starts with meteors already in flight rather than an empty screen.

properties.label: Horizontal Offset
properties.description: Shifts the center point horizontally for Implode and Explode modes. Negative values move the center left, positive values move it right.

properties.label: Vertical Offset
properties.description: Shifts the center point vertically for Implode and Explode modes. Negative values move the center down, positive values move it up.

properties.label: Adjust count based on music
properties.description: When enabled, the meteor count is scaled by the current music volume, producing more meteors during loud passages and fewer during quiet ones.

properties.label: Starfield simulation
properties.description: For Implode/Explode modes, meteors fade in brightness based on their distance from center, creating a 3D starfield depth illusion.

properties.label: X1a
properties.description: X coordinate of the first endpoint of the starting line (side A start). Defines where the morph begins on one side.

properties.label: Y1a
properties.description: Y coordinate of the first endpoint of the starting line (side A start). Defines where the morph begins on one side.

properties.label: X1b
properties.description: X coordinate of the second endpoint of the starting line (side B start). Together with X1a/Y1a, defines the width and angle of the starting line.

properties.label: Y1b
properties.description: Y coordinate of the second endpoint of the starting line (side B start). Together with X1b, defines the other end of the starting line.

properties.label: Head Length
properties.description: Length of the colored head at the start of the morph. This value blends with the end head length as the morph progresses.

properties.label: Link Points
properties.description: When enabled, the second start point (X1b/Y1b) is locked to the first start point (X1a/Y1a), making the start a single point instead of a line.

properties.label: X2a
properties.description: X coordinate of the first endpoint of the ending line (side A end). Defines where the morph finishes on one side.

properties.label: Y2a
properties.description: Y coordinate of the first endpoint of the ending line (side A end). Defines where the morph finishes on one side.

properties.label: X2b
properties.description: X coordinate of the second endpoint of the ending line (side B end). Together with X2a/Y2a, defines the width and angle of the ending line.

properties.label: Y2b
properties.description: Y coordinate of the second endpoint of the ending line (side B end). Together with X2b, defines the other end of the ending line.

properties.label: Head Length
properties.description: Length of the colored head at the end of the morph. The head length transitions from the start value to this value as the morph progresses.

properties.label: Link Points
properties.description: When enabled, the second end point (X2b/Y2b) is locked to the first end point (X2a/Y2a), making the end a single point instead of a line.

properties.label: Head Duration
properties.description: Percentage of the effect duration during which the head is visible and moving. The remaining time shows only the fading tail.

properties.label: Acceleration
properties.description: Applies acceleration or deceleration to the morph movement. Positive values speed up toward the end, negative values slow down.

properties.label: Repeat Count
properties.description: Number of parallel copies of the morph drawn alongside the original. Creates multiple evenly-spaced morph lines across the model.

properties.label: Repeat Skip
properties.description: Pixel spacing between each repeated morph copy. Higher values spread the repeated morphs farther apart.

properties.label: Stagger
properties.description: Time offset between repeated morph copies so they start at different times, creating a wave or cascade effect. Negative values reverse the stagger order.

properties.label: Show Head at Start
properties.description: When enabled, the full head is visible at the starting position from the first frame, rather than growing in from nothing.

properties.label: Auto Repeat
properties.description: Automatically calculates the repeat count needed to fill the entire model based on the morph size and skip spacing.

properties.label: Quick Set
properties.description: Preset start/end point configurations (Full or Single Sweep in each direction) that write predefined values into all eight X/Y coordinate fields at once. Selection resets to blank after the preset is applied.
Swap the start and end X/Y coordinate values (and any active value curves) so the morph plays in reverse.

properties.label: Pan (deg)
properties.description: The horizontal pan angle in degrees for the moving head fixture. Controls left/right beam positioning.

properties.label: Tilt (deg)
properties.description: The vertical tilt angle in degrees for the moving head fixture. Controls up/down beam positioning.

properties.label: Fan Pan
properties.description: Pan offset in degrees applied incrementally across grouped fixtures, fanning them apart horizontally. Creates a spread effect when multiple heads are grouped.

properties.label: Fan Tilt
properties.description: Tilt offset in degrees applied incrementally across grouped fixtures, fanning them apart vertically. Creates a spread effect when multiple heads are grouped.

properties.label: Groupings
properties.description: Number of fixture groupings for fan offset distribution. Fixtures within the same group share the same pan/tilt, with fan offsets applied between groups.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of full movement cycles to complete over the effect duration. Controls how many times a pathing animation repeats.

properties.label: MHPathDef
properties.description: Encoded definition string for the movement path. Defines waypoints and curves that the moving head beam follows over time.

properties.label: Scale
properties.description: Scales the size of the movement path. Positive values enlarge the path, negative values shrink it, and zero uses the default size.

properties.label: Time Offset
properties.description: Shifts the starting point in time along the movement path. Use to stagger multiple fixtures following the same path at different phases.

properties.label: Ignore Pan
properties.description: When enabled, the pan component of the path is ignored, keeping the fixture at its current horizontal position while only tilt changes.

properties.label: Ignore Tilt
properties.description: When enabled, the tilt component of the path is ignored, keeping the fixture at its current vertical position while only pan changes.

properties.label: Auto Shutter
properties.description: When enabled, the fixture shutter automatically opens when the dimmer is above zero and closes when the dimmer is zero, preventing unwanted light leaks during repositioning.

properties.label: MH1_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 1. Stores individual pan, tilt, and other parameters that differ from the group defaults.

properties.label: MH2_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 2.

properties.label: MH3_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 3.

properties.label: MH4_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 4.

properties.label: MH5_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 5.

properties.label: MH6_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 6.

properties.label: MH7_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 7.

properties.label: MH8_Settings
properties.description: Per-fixture override settings for moving head fixture 8.

properties.label: Bars
properties.description: Number of vertical bars spread across the model width, each representing a range of notes from the audio spectrum.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Animation style for each bar. Morph sweeps color upward, Bounce alternates direction per event, Collide moves colors inward from both edges, Separate moves them outward, and On fills the entire bar height.

properties.label: Start Note
properties.description: Lowest MIDI note number to include in the visualization. Notes below this are ignored.

properties.label: End Note
properties.description: Highest MIDI note number to include in the visualization. Notes above this are ignored.

properties.label: Sensitivity
properties.description: Threshold for triggering a music event. Lower values detect quieter notes; higher values require louder audio to activate a bar.

properties.label: Offset
properties.description: Horizontal pixel offset applied to the entire bar display, shifting the visualization left or right on the model.

properties.label: Scale Bars
properties.description: When enabled, each bar is scaled to fill its proportional share of the model width rather than being a single pixel wide.

properties.label: Notes Scaling
properties.description: Controls how the sensitivity threshold is scaled. None uses a fixed threshold, Individual Notes scales per bar based on each bar's peak, and All Notes scales based on the overall peak volume.

properties.label: Color
properties.description: How colors from the palette are applied. Distinct assigns color bands by position within each bar, Blend smoothly interpolates between palette colors, and Cycle rotates through colors for each successive music event.

properties.label: Fade
properties.description: When enabled, the bar colors fade in alpha from bottom to top, creating a transparency gradient within each active bar.

properties.label: Logarithmic X axis
properties.description: When enabled, assigns more bars to lower frequencies and fewer to higher frequencies using a logarithmic scale, matching how humans perceive pitch.

properties.label: Off_Style
properties.description: Controls how pixels are turned off. Black sets all pixels to black, Transparent leaves pixels unchanged, and the conversion modes swap black pixels to transparent or vice versa.

properties.label: Start Intensity
properties.description: Sets the brightness level at the beginning of the effect as a percentage of the palette color's full value.

properties.label: End Intensity
properties.description: Sets the brightness level at the end of the effect as a percentage. The intensity ramps linearly from Start to End over the effect duration.

properties.label: Transparency
properties.description: Sets the alpha transparency of the effect. At 0 the color is fully opaque; at 100 it is fully transparent, allowing effects on lower layers to show through.

properties.label: Cycle Count
properties.description: Number of times the start-to-end intensity ramp repeats over the effect duration. Values greater than 1 create a pulsing look.

properties.label: Shimmer
properties.description: When enabled, the effect alternates between the first and second palette colors on each frame, creating a rapid flickering shimmer.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: The visual style for displaying notes. True Piano renders a piano keyboard with keys lighting up; Bars displays horizontal bars for each active note.

properties.label: Start MIDI Channel [0-127]
properties.description: The lowest MIDI note number to display. Notes below this value are ignored. Middle C is 60.

properties.label: End MIDI Channel
properties.description: The highest MIDI note number to display. Together with Start MIDI, defines the visible note range on the keyboard.

properties.label: Show Sharps and Flats
properties.description: When enabled, black keys (sharps/flats) are rendered on the piano. When disabled, only white keys are shown.

properties.label: Fade notes
properties.description: When enabled, notes gradually fade out over their duration instead of staying at full brightness until they end.

properties.label: Track
properties.description: The timing track containing MIDI note data that drives the piano display. The track must contain note-on/off events.

properties.label: Vertical Scale
properties.description: Scales the vertical size of the piano keys or bars as a percentage. Lower values shrink the display; 100 uses the full buffer height.

properties.label: Horizontal Offset
properties.description: Shifts the piano display left or right within the buffer. Use to position the keyboard when the note range does not fill the full width.

Image file selection: Select / AI Generate / Clear buttons, animated preview thumbnail, filename label, and a hidden text control that holds the actual path so the saved E_TEXTCTRL_Pictures_Filename round-trips.

properties.label: Movement
properties.description: Direction the image moves across the model. Includes scrolling, peekaboo pop-in effects, wiggle, zoom, flag wave, single-pass movements, and tiling modes.

properties.label: Movement Speed
properties.description: How fast the image moves in the chosen direction. Higher values make the image scroll or animate more quickly.

properties.label: Frame Rate Adj
properties.description: Multiplier for the playback speed of animated GIF frames. Values above 1.0 speed up the animation, values below 1.0 slow it down.

properties.label: Offsets In Pixels
properties.description: When enabled, the X and Y center offset values are treated as pixel counts rather than percentages of the model dimensions.

properties.label: Scaling
properties.description: How the image is resized to fit the model. No Scaling uses the original pixel size, Scale To Fit stretches to fill, and the aspect ratio options preserve proportions with or without cropping.

properties.label: Shimmer
properties.description: When enabled, the image flickers on and off on alternating frames, creating a shimmering visual effect.

properties.label: Loop Animated GIF
properties.description: When enabled, an animated GIF restarts from the first frame after reaching the last frame, looping continuously for the duration of the effect.

properties.label: Suppress GIF Background
properties.description: When enabled, the background color of an animated GIF is treated as transparent, allowing underlying effects to show through.
Transparent Black checkbox with an inline brightness threshold slider (0-300). When enabled, image pixels at or below the threshold are keyed out as transparent.

properties.label: X-axis Center
properties.description: Horizontal offset for the starting position of the image, as a percentage of the model width.

properties.label: Wrap X
properties.description: When enabled, the image wraps around horizontally so pixels that scroll off one side reappear on the other.

properties.label: Y-axis Center
properties.description: Vertical offset for the starting position of the image, as a percentage of the model height.

properties.label: X-axis Center
properties.description: Horizontal offset for the ending position of the image when using the vector movement mode.

properties.label: Y-axis Center
properties.description: Vertical offset for the ending position of the image when using the vector movement mode.

properties.label: Scaling
properties.description: Scale factor for the image at the start of the effect, as a percentage. 100 is the original size.

properties.label: Scaling
properties.description: Scale factor for the image at the end of the effect. The image smoothly transitions from the start scale to this value over the effect duration.

properties.label: #Arms
properties.description: Number of colored arms radiating from the center of the pinwheel. Each arm uses the next color from the palette.

properties.label: Size
properties.description: Length of each arm as a percentage of the maximum radius. Values above 100 extend the arms beyond the model edges.

properties.label: Twist
properties.description: Degrees of curvature applied along each arm from center to tip. Positive values twist clockwise, negative values twist counter-clockwise, creating spiral arms.

properties.label: Thick
properties.description: Width of each arm as a percentage of the angular space between arms. At 100, adjacent arms touch with no gap between them.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Rotation speed of the pinwheel. Higher values make the arms spin faster.

properties.label: Offset
properties.description: Starting angular offset in degrees for the pinwheel arms. Rotates the initial position of the entire pinwheel without affecting the spin animation.

properties.label: Style
properties.description: Rendering algorithm to use. The new method uses ISPC-accelerated rendering for better performance and fills the entire buffer; the old method draws arms by stepping along radial lines. Existing sequences are migrated to preserve 'Old Render Method' so their look doesn't change.

properties.label: Rotation
properties.description: Sets the rotation direction. When checked, the pinwheel spins counter-clockwise; when unchecked, it spins clockwise.

properties.label: 3D
properties.description: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient across each arm to simulate depth. 3D fades edges, 3D Inverted fades the center, and Sweep applies a directional gradient from one edge to the other.

properties.label: X-axis Center
properties.description: Horizontal position of the pinwheel center as a percentage offset from the model center.

properties.label: Y-axis center
properties.description: Vertical position of the pinwheel center as a percentage offset from the model center.

properties.label: Color Choice
properties.description: Color scheme for the plasma pattern. Normal uses the effect's palette colors; the preset options use built-in color combinations with different hue ranges.

properties.label: Add Twist to Effect
properties.description: Selects the mathematical formula used to generate the plasma pattern. Higher values produce more complex, twisted interference patterns.

properties.label: Line Density
properties.description: Controls how tightly packed the plasma wave lines are. Higher values produce finer, more detailed patterns with more color transitions across the model.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the plasma pattern animates and flows. Higher values make the waves move more quickly.

properties.label: Draw Style
properties.description: Rendering style and direction for the ripple waves. Lines draw outlines only, Solid fills the shapes, and Highlight emphasizes edges. Inward/Outward/Both controls the wave direction, and Ripple variants add repeated wave pulses.

properties.label: Object
properties.description: Shape of the ripple waves expanding from the center. Choose from geometric shapes, holiday objects, or load a custom SVG outline.

properties.label: SVG
properties.description: Path to a simple SVG file whose outline is used as the ripple shape when Object is set to SVG.

properties.label: Movement
properties.description: Controls whether ripple waves expand outward (Explode), contract inward (Implode), or remain stationary (None) over the effect duration.

properties.label: Scale
properties.description: Overall size of the ripple pattern as a percentage. Values above 100 expand the ripples beyond the model boundaries.

properties.label: Outline
properties.description: Thickness of each ripple line. Higher values draw wider ripple bands; lower values produce thinner outlines.

properties.label: Ripples
properties.description: Number of concentric ripple rings displayed simultaneously. More ripples create a denser wave pattern.

properties.label: Spacing
properties.description: Distance between consecutive ripple rings. Larger values spread the rings farther apart.

properties.label: Cycle Cnt
properties.description: Number of complete ripple animation cycles over the effect duration. Higher values repeat the expand/contract motion more times.

properties.label: Points
properties.description: Number of points for star, polygon, and snowflake shapes. Only applies when one of those shapes is selected.

properties.label: Rotation
properties.description: Rotates the ripple shape by this many degrees. Useful for orienting non-circular shapes like triangles or stars.

properties.label: Twist
properties.description: Applies increasing rotation to each successive ripple ring, creating a spiral twist effect. Positive and negative values twist in opposite directions.

properties.label: X Center
properties.description: Horizontal position of the ripple center as a percentage offset from the model center.

properties.label: Y Center
properties.description: Vertical position of the ripple center as a percentage offset from the model center.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Speed at which the ripple center moves across the model in the specified direction. Zero keeps the center stationary.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees that the ripple center travels when velocity is non-zero. 0 is right, 90 is up, etc.

properties.label: 3D
properties.description: When enabled, applies a brightness gradient to the ripple rings to simulate a three-dimensional depth effect.

properties.label: Base Channel
properties.description: Selects which channel on the DMX model to control. The channel list is populated from the model's node names.

properties.label: 16 bit
properties.description: When enabled, outputs a 16-bit value across two channels (coarse and fine) for higher precision servo positioning. When disabled, uses a single 8-bit channel.

properties.label: Use Timing Track
properties.description: When enabled, the servo position is driven by phoneme data from a timing track instead of the start/end value sliders, useful for lip-sync animations.

properties.label: Timing Track
properties.description: Selects which timing track to use for phoneme-driven servo positioning when Use Timing Track is enabled.
Start/End servo position sliders (0-100% as a float with 0.1 precision) with optional value-curve and per-effect link toggles.
Sync (mirrors Start and End values), Equal (copies Start to End), and Swap (exchanges Start and End) action buttons.

Custom block with Select/Clear/Download buttons, animated shader preview, and filename label. The shader file path is serialized as E_0FILEPICKERCTRL_IFS via a hidden file picker; the leading 0 forces it to be processed first at load time so the shader config is known before dynamic uniform settings are applied.

properties.label: Lead in frames
properties.description: Number of frames to pre-render before the effect starts, allowing time-based shaders to reach a desired visual state at the beginning of the effect.

Custom Time Speed slider row. Built as a BulkEditSliderF2 with the slider as the serialized control (E_SLIDER_Shader_Speed, divisor 100) and a buddy text control, matching the legacy naming so old sequences continue to deserialize.

properties.label: Offset X
properties.description: Horizontal offset of the shader viewport as a percentage. Only active for shaders that consume iResolution / coordinate uniforms.

properties.label: Offset Y
properties.description: Vertical offset of the shader viewport as a percentage. Only active for shaders that consume iResolution / coordinate uniforms.

properties.label: Zoom
properties.description: Zoom level for the shader output. Positive values zoom in, negative values zoom out, and zero shows the shader at its native scale. Only active for shaders that consume iResolution / coordinate uniforms.

Container for per-shader dynamic uniform controls. The subclass parses the loaded shader's uniform declarations and builds sliders, checkboxes, choices, and point controls here; this sizer is wiped and rebuilt whenever the shader file changes.

properties.label: Object to Draw
properties.description: The geometric shape, holiday object, emoji, or SVG to draw. Random selects a different shape for each new instance.

properties.label: Character
properties.description: Font used for rendering emoji characters when Object to Draw is set to Emoji.

properties.label: Character Code
properties.description: Unicode code point of the emoji or character to display when Object to Draw is set to Emoji.

properties.label: Skin Tone
properties.description: Skin tone modifier applied to emoji characters that support it. Only affects emoji rendering.

properties.label: SVG File
properties.description: Path to an SVG file to use as the shape when Object to Draw is set to SVG.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: Line thickness used to draw the outline of each shape. Higher values produce bolder outlines.

properties.label: Count
properties.description: Number of shape instances spawned simultaneously on the model.

properties.label: Start Size
properties.description: Initial size of each shape when it first appears. The shape then grows or shrinks according to the Growth setting over its lifetime.

properties.label: Random initial shape sizes
properties.description: When enabled, each shape starts at a random size and age rather than all beginning at the same start size, creating a more organic initial appearance.

properties.label: Velocity
properties.description: Speed at which each shape moves across the model in the specified direction. Zero keeps shapes stationary.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Angle in degrees that shapes travel when velocity is non-zero. 0 is right, 90 is up, 180 is left, 270 is down.

properties.label: Lifetime
properties.description: How long each shape lives as a percentage of the total effect duration. After this time the shape is removed and a new one may be spawned.

properties.label: Growth
properties.description: Rate at which each shape changes size over its lifetime. Positive values make shapes grow larger, negative values make them shrink.

properties.label: X Center
properties.description: Horizontal spawn position for shapes as a percentage of the model width, when random location is disabled.

properties.label: Y Center
properties.description: Vertical spawn position for shapes as a percentage of the model height, when random location is disabled.

properties.label: Points
properties.description: Number of points on star shapes. Only applies when the Object to Draw is set to Star.

properties.label: Rotation
properties.description: Rotation angle in degrees applied to each shape. Use a value curve to animate the shapes spinning over time.

properties.label: Random Location
properties.description: When enabled, each shape spawns at a random position on the model instead of at the X/Y Center position.

properties.label: Random movement
properties.description: When enabled, each shape gets a random velocity and direction instead of using the Velocity and Direction settings.

properties.label: Fade Away
properties.description: When enabled, shapes gradually become transparent as they age, fading out over their lifetime.

properties.label: Hold Color
properties.description: When enabled, each shape keeps the color it was assigned at creation. When disabled, shapes follow the current palette color as it changes.

properties.label: Fire with music
properties.description: When enabled, new shapes are spawned in response to audio peaks in the music rather than at regular intervals.

properties.label: Trigger level
properties.description: Audio volume threshold for triggering new shapes when Fire with music is enabled. Lower values trigger on quieter sounds.

properties.label: Fire with timing track
properties.description: When enabled, new shapes are spawned at each timing mark in the selected timing track instead of at regular intervals.

properties.label: Timing Track
properties.description: Selects which timing track to use for triggering new shapes when Fire with timing track is enabled.

properties.label: Filter Label
properties.description: Only timing marks whose label matches this text will trigger new shapes. Leave empty to match all marks.

properties.label: Reg
properties.description: When enabled, the Filter Label is treated as a regular expression for matching timing mark labels instead of a plain text match.

properties.label: Duty Factor
properties.description: Percentage of each cycle the color is visible before going black. Lower values produce shorter on-flashes with longer dark gaps.

properties.label: Cycle Count
properties.description: Number of on/off shimmer cycles over the duration of the effect. Higher values produce faster flickering.

properties.label: Use All Colors
properties.description: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a random color from the palette every frame. When disabled, all pixels use the same color which cycles sequentially through the palette.

properties.label: Pre v2017.7 Shimmer
properties.description: Uses the legacy shimmer rendering algorithm from before version 2017.7 for backward compatibility with older sequences.

properties.label: Center X
properties.description: Horizontal center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer width.

properties.label: Center Y
properties.description: Vertical center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer height.

properties.label: Radius1
properties.description: Starting radius of the expanding ring at the beginning of each cycle.

properties.label: Radius2
properties.description: Ending radius of the expanding ring at the end of each cycle.

properties.label: Width1
properties.description: Thickness of the ring band at the start of each cycle.

properties.label: Width2
properties.description: Thickness of the ring band at the end of each cycle.

properties.label: Acceleration
properties.description: Adjusts the expansion speed curve. Positive values make the ring expand slowly then accelerate; negative values make it start fast then decelerate.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of times the shockwave ring expands from Radius1 to Radius2 over the effect duration.

properties.label: Blend Edges
properties.description: When enabled, the ring edges fade out smoothly based on distance from the ring center, creating a soft glow instead of hard edges.

properties.label: Scale to Buffer
properties.description: When enabled, radius and width values are treated as percentages of the buffer size. When disabled, values are in absolute pixels.

properties.label: Colors
properties.description: Selects the color source for the chase. Palette uses the user-defined palette colors; Rainbow cycles through all hues automatically.

properties.label: Number Chases
properties.description: Number of simultaneous chase segments running across the strand.

properties.label: Chase Size
properties.description: Length of each lit chase segment as a percentage of the total strand length.

properties.label: Cycles
properties.description: Number of complete chase traversals over the effect duration. Higher values make the chase move faster.

properties.label: Offset
properties.description: Shifts the starting position of the chase pattern along the strand. Useful for staggering chases across multiple models.

properties.label: Chase Types
properties.description: Direction and movement pattern of the chase. Bounce types reverse at edges, Dual runs two chases simultaneously, Static types display without motion, and Middle types expand or contract from the center.

properties.label: Fade
properties.description: Applies a brightness fade to the chase segment. 'From Head' fades from the leading edge, 'From Tail' from the trailing edge, 'Head and Tail' fades both ends, and 'Middle' fades from the center outward.

properties.label: Group All Strands
properties.description: When enabled, treats all strands of the model as one continuous strand for the chase, so the pattern flows seamlessly across strand boundaries.

properties.label: Band size
properties.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each colored band of the skip pattern.

properties.label: Skip size
properties.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each colored band. Set to 0 for no gaps.

properties.label: Starting Position
properties.description: Pixel offset where the first band begins on the strand.

properties.label: Number of Advances
properties.description: Number of times the skip pattern shifts position over the effect duration. Higher values make the pattern appear to march along the strand.

properties.label: Direction
properties.description: Direction in which the skip pattern is drawn. 'From Middle' and 'To Middle' mirror the pattern from the center of the strand.

properties.label: FX
properties.description: Selects which WS2812FX-style animation to run, such as Blink, Breath, Color Wipe, Rainbow, Fire Flicker, and many more.

properties.label: Palette
properties.description: Selects the color palette mode used by the chosen FX animation, controlling how colors are applied to the effect.

properties.label: Intensity
properties.description: Controls the intensity parameter of the selected FX animation. Its exact meaning varies by effect (e.g., brightness, size, or density).

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls the speed of the selected FX animation. Higher values produce faster transitions and movement.
Explanatory text describing the Sketch effect plus links to demo videos. Display only — not part of the saved effect.
Read-only display of the active sketch definition string. The actual sketch is drawn / edited via the Effect Assist panel; this control just shows the resulting definition.
Background image used as a tracing reference inside the Effect Assist panel. The image itself is not rendered into the effect output.

properties.label: Opacity
properties.description: Opacity (0-255) of the background tracing image when shown inside the Effect Assist panel. Has no effect on rendering — just controls how prominent the reference image is when sketching.

properties.label: Draw Percentage
properties.description: Percentage of the effect duration over which the sketch progressively draws on. The remaining duration shows the fully drawn sketch. Disabled when Motion is enabled.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: Line thickness in pixels used when drawing the sketch.

properties.label: Motion
properties.description: When enabled, the sketch is fully drawn over the entire effect duration but only a percentage is rendered at any given time, creating simple motion-graphics-like effects.

properties.label: Motion Percentage
properties.description: When Motion is enabled, percentage of the sketch to render at any given time. Only used when Motion is enabled.

properties.label: Max flakes
properties.description: Maximum number of snowflakes visible on the buffer at the same time.

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Selects the snowflake shape. 0 uses a random mix of all types each frame. Types 1-9 are specific shapes ranging from single pixels to multi-node crosses, diamonds, and squares.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast snowflakes move. In Driving mode this affects horizontal and vertical scroll speed; in Falling modes it controls the rate of downward movement.

properties.label: Falling
properties.description: Selects the snowflake movement mode. 'Driving' scrolls flakes diagonally across the buffer. 'Falling' drops flakes from top to bottom. 'Falling & Accumulating' drops flakes that pile up at the bottom.

properties.label: Warm up frames
properties.description: Number of simulation frames to run before the effect starts rendering. This pre-fills the buffer so falling snowflakes appear mid-flight from the first visible frame.

properties.label: Max flakes
properties.description: Number of snowstorm particles wandering across the buffer. Each particle leaves a fading trail behind it.

properties.label: Trail Length
properties.description: Maximum length of the fading trail behind each particle. Longer trails create streaky, wind-blown looks.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast each particle moves and how quickly trails grow and decay. Higher values produce more energetic, rapid movement.

properties.label: Palette Rep
properties.description: Number of times the full color palette is repeated across the spirals. Higher values create more spiral arms by duplicating the palette pattern.

properties.label: Spiral Wraps
properties.description: Number of times each spiral arm wraps around the model from bottom to top. Negative values reverse the wrap direction. Larger absolute values produce tighter spirals.

properties.label: Thickness
properties.description: Width of each spiral arm as a percentage of the available space. At 100% the arms fill the entire model with no gaps between them.

properties.label: Movement
properties.description: Speed and direction of the spiral rotation. Positive values rotate in one direction, negative in the other. Zero keeps the spirals stationary.

properties.label: Blend
properties.description: When enabled, blends all palette colors vertically across each spiral arm instead of using distinct per-arm colors.

properties.label: 3D
properties.description: When enabled, applies a brightness gradient across each spiral arm to simulate a 3D shading effect, making the arms appear rounded.

properties.label: Grow
properties.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually increase in thickness over the effect duration.

properties.label: Shrink
properties.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually decrease in thickness over the effect duration. When both Grow and Shrink are enabled, the arms grow then shrink.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast the spirograph pattern rotates over time. Higher values make the drawing point orbit more quickly.

properties.label: R - Radius of outer circle
properties.description: Radius of the fixed outer circle as a percentage of the buffer width. This sets the overall size of the spirograph pattern.

properties.label: r - Radius of inner circle
properties.description: Radius of the rolling inner circle as a percentage of the buffer width. The ratio of R to r determines the number of lobes in the pattern. Must be less than or equal to R.
